title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Pro-XG-48-POE
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / UniFi Switches
description: The UniFi Switch USW-Pro-XG-48-PoE is a managed L3 PoE switch with a switching capacity of 920 Gbps , (16) 2.5-Gigabit LAN, (32) 10-Gigabit LAN ports and four SFP28 (25G/10G/1G) ports. All Ethernet ports support PoE+++ 802.3af/at/bt PoE-Out with an output power of up to 90W/port and a total PoE budget of 1080 W . The ports feature Etherlighting , allowing you to illuminate ports with colors to show port location, speed/connection, and VLAN. The switch is powered via 230V AC, and the USP RPS DC… (16) 2.5G ports â supports 802.3af/at/bt PoE+++ (90W/port) (32) 10G ports â supports 802.3af/at/bt PoE+++ (90W/port) (4) 25/10/1G SFP28 ports 1080 W PoE budget Etherlighting â visual indication of port information Rack-mountable Managed via UniFi Network Server The USW-Pro-XG-48-PoE does not have a web-based management interface but is centrally managed using the UniFi Network Server with support for the UniFi mobile app. It offers an extensive suite of advanced L2 and L3 switching protocols and features, including per-port operation modes (switching, mirroring, or aggregation). The UniFi Network Server and mobile app allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all switch functions via a graphical user interface from anywhere Device Power cable Rack-mount brackets
